---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new guide, template, or data addition
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear description of what the problem is. E.g. "I'm always frustrated when the AI ships [...] because there's no guide covering [...]"

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Type

Check one:

- [ ] New guide (a new dimension of design not yet covered)
- [ ] New template (React component / CSS pattern)
- [ ] New data entry (website / theme / palette / font-pair / animation)
- [ ] Improvement to existing guide
- [ ] Improvement to existing template
- [ ] Tooling (CLI, Figma plugin, etc.)
- [ ] Other

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or reference links here.
